prompt_text:
### Demographics: 43-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 99.3 kg; Height 183.5 cm; BMI 29.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 146/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.4%; 9 months ago 7.1%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 6.9%; current 6.9%), FPG (12 months ago 187mg/dL; 9 months ago 187mg/dL; 6 months ago 188mg/dL; 3 months ago 151mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 99.7kg; 9 months ago 99.2kg; 6 months ago 93.6kg; 3 months ago 98.3kg; current 99.3kg), Height (12 months ago 183.5cm; 9 months ago 183.5cm; 6 months ago 183.5cm; 3 months ago 183.5cm; current 183.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 29.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 141mmHg; 9 months ago 146mmHg; 6 months ago 142mmHg; 3 months ago 142mmHg; current 146mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 57U/L; 9 months ago 61U/L; 6 months ago 58U/L; 3 months ago 50U/L; current 58U/L), AST (12 months ago 41U/L; 9 months ago 38U/L; 6 months ago 43U/L; 3 months ago 33U/L; current 42U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 68mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 69mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 72mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 68mL/min/1.73m²; current 69mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 98mg/g; 9 months ago 73mg/g; 6 months ago 96mg/g; 3 months ago 78mg/g; current 92mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 133mg/dL; 9 months ago 150mg/dL; 6 months ago 154mg/dL; 3 months ago 151mg/dL; current 144mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.3g/dL; 9 months ago 12.7g/dL; 6 months ago 12.7g/dL; 3 months ago 13.2g/dL; current 13.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
